title: Oatmeal Scotchies
instructions:
In a small bowl combine the flour, baking powder, baking soda and salt. Set aside.
In a large bowl with an electric mixer, combine the butter, sugar, eggs and water until creamy. Gradually add the flour mixture.
Stir in the oats, butterscotch morsels and orange extract.
Drop by spoon onto a greased cookie sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes.
